title: 7 Claude Cowork Skills Every Accountant Should Install
description: Install 7 ready-made Claude skills that handle common accounting workflows — from tax workpapers to depreciation schedules.

steps.title: Understand what Claude Skills are and why they matter
steps.content: Skills are reusable markdown files that give Claude pre-built instructions for specific tasks. Instead of re-prompting every time, you load a skill and it executes immediately. Less context to send, fewer tokens used, faster and more consistent results.

steps.title: Install the Month-End Close Agent skill
steps.content: This skill handles the full close pipeline: pull data, reconcile, draft entries, produce statements, write commentary, package workpapers, and finalize the close memo. Run the whole pipeline or just the piece you need.

steps.title: Install the Tax Workpaper Populator skill
steps.content: This skill takes source tax documents and populates your workpaper template automatically. It reads through PDFs, extracts the relevant data points, and drops them into the right fields.

steps.title: Install the Budget vs. Actuals Reporter skill
steps.content: This skill pulls your budget and actuals, calculates variances, and writes commentary explaining what drove each significant difference. Output is ready for management review.

steps.title: Install the Missing Documents Tracker skill
steps.content: This skill cross-references your client checklist against what's been received. It identifies what's still missing, who needs to provide it, and drafts follow-up messages.

steps.title: Install the Bank Reconciliation Builder skill
steps.content: A standalone reconciliation skill that matches bank statement transactions to GL entries, flags unmatched items, and produces a formatted reconciliation workpaper.

steps.title: Install the Invoice & Receipt Extractor skill
steps.content: This skill reads invoices and receipts (PDF or image), extracts vendor, amount, date, and category, and outputs a structured table ready for entry or review.

steps.title: Install the Depreciation Scheduler skill
steps.content: This skill takes your fixed asset register, applies the correct depreciation method and useful life for each asset, and produces the monthly depreciation schedule with journal entries.
